reason: A classic sword-and-sorcery quest where a ragtag group forges unforgettable bonds over a daring rescue and epic adventure.
Dorothy’s epic trek down the Yellow Brick Road with a motley crew highlights how friendship and growth matter more than home.
A trio of lost pets embarks on a perilous journey across the wilderness, discovering loyalty and friendship along the way.
Kermit’s ragtag crew sets sail on a swashbuckling treasure hunt, growing closer through hilarious mishaps and true friendship.
A band of mismatched toys navigates a rescue quest, learning about trust and growing together more than reaching their goal.
Shipwrecked family unites to survive on a tropical island, transforming disparate personalities into a strong, loving unit.
Indiana Jones and his unlikely allies race across continents in a pulse-pounding quest that bonds them through danger.
Father and son embark on a globe-trotting quest for the Holy Grail, strengthening their bond with each daring escapade.
Luke, Leia, Han and Chewbacca form a rebel team on a daring quest to destroy the Death Star and discover themselves.
A mismatched naval crew explores an undersea odyssey aboard the Nautilus, forging bonds amid wonder and peril.
